first_run.rationale: The scores for both candidates are identical (2/10), and the core reasoning is consistent across both evaluations. Both versions correctly identify the critical mismatch between the candidate's experience (roughly 6 months of C++) and the role's hard requirement (8 years of C++), as well as the lack of platform leadership experience. The differences in wording and emphasis are minor, stylistic variations that fall within the expected range of run-to-run noise and do not reflect any change in the substantive assessment of the candidate's qualifications.
